case_title: HAYS, EDWARD P. VS STILLWELL, JEAN MARIE C/O ZACSON CORP.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY HAYS, EDWARD P. AS TO DEFENDANT STILLWELL, JEAN MARIE C/O ZACSON CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-05-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07 TRIAL OF MAR-29-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STILLWELL, JEAN MARIE C/O ZACSON CORP.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAYS, EDWARD P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STILLWELL, JEAN MARIE C/O ZACSON CORP. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,595.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT STILLWELL, JEAN MARIE C/O ZACSON CORP.
